items.title: Becker's '89 US Open trophy sells for record $357K
items.summary: Boris Becker's 1989 US Open men's singles trophy sold for $357,546 (including buyer's premium) Sunday, the most ever paid for a tennis trophy.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Lions have discussed fifth-year options for Jahmyr Gibbs, Jack Campbell
items.summary: That means Detroit has to decide on the fifth-year options for both players in the coming weeks.
